hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM - 7:00 PM. Closed on Sundays.

services.Consultations: Free of charge, must be booked in advance.

booking_policy: Bookings are handled exclusively via our WhatsApp business loop or our official website. We enforce a strict 24-hour cancellation policy.
qualification_questions: What specific treatment or area are you looking to target?
Have you ever had clinical aesthetic treatments before?
What is your preferred day or time window for an appointment?
escalation_rules: Formal customer complaints or expressions of negative sentiment.
Complex medical advice or prescription inquiries.
Direct pricing negotiation or discount requests.
More than two consecutive out-of-scope/unresolved inquiries.
